notes: The game appears to run without problems. The text is off-centre unless you install MS Gothic (see the pinned thread about this in the game's Steam discussion forum) – run the game once, exit it, then download and install the font, putting it in “/path/to/Steam/SteamApps/compatdata/373770/pfx/drive_c/windows/Fonts/”.
title: LiEat

notes: The game starts and runs normally like with W10 but the window isn't resizable and the process has to be killed to actually close the game.
title: LiEat

notes: To fix the font, install MS Gothic font (I installed it system-wide, not in wine-prefix folder. Works fine.) Send kill signal to actually close the Game.exe.
title: LiEat

notes: Launcher sometimes won't show up correctly. When it does and you get ingame, all tiles and fonts are messed up. Starting the game manually per Wine works though.
title: LiEat
